sentences.target: J'observe les oiseaux sur le balcon.

translations.fr: J'observe les oiseaux sur le balcon.
translations.en: I watch the birds on the balcony.
translations.es: Observo los pájaros en el balcón.
translations.de: Ich beobachte die Vögel auf dem Balkon.
translations.yue: 我喺陽台度睇住啲雀仔。
translations.ru: Я наблюдаю за птицами на балконе.
translations.vi: Tôi quan sát những con chim trên ban công.
translations.nl: Ik kijk naar de vogels op het balkon.
translations.uk: Я спостерігаю за птахами на балконі.
translations.hi: मैं बालकनी पर पक्षियों को देखता हूँ।
translations.nb: Jeg ser på fuglene på balkongen.
translations.sv: Jag tittar på fåglarna på balkongen.
translations.da: Jeg kigger på fuglene på altanen.
translations.ja: バルコニーで鳥を眺めます。

tokens.explanation: Elision of subject pronoun je before vowel-initial verb; finite verb in present indicative, 1st person singular; head of the clause.
Definite article, plural; introduces the noun oiseaux and marks definiteness.
Common noun, masculine plural; direct object of the verb; denotes birds.
Preposition marking location; governs the noun phrase le balcon.
Definite article, masculine singular; introduces balcon.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition sur; denotes the place.

sentences.target: Tu observes le chat par la fenêtre.
sentences.reading: /ty ɔp.sɛʁv lə ʃa paʁ la fənɛtʁ/

translations.fr: Tu observes le chat par la fenêtre.
translations.ipa: /ty ɔp.sɛʁv lə ʃa paʁ la fənɛtʁ/
translations.en: You watch the cat through the window.
translations.es: Observas al gato por la ventana.
translations.de: Du beobachtest die Katze durch das Fenster.
translations.it: Osservi il gatto attraverso la finestra.
translations.zh-Hans: 你透过窗户观察那只猫。
translations.ru: Ты наблюдаешь за котом через окно.
translations.pt: Você observa o gato pela janela.
translations.vi: Bạn quan sát con mèo qua cửa sổ.
translations.ar: تنظر إلى القطة من خلال النافذة.
translations.nl: Je kijkt door het raam naar de kat.
translations.uk: Ти спостерігаєш за котом крізь вікно.
translations.hu: Az ablakon át nézed a macskát.
translations.hi: तुम खिड़की से बिल्ली को देखते हो।
translations.el: Παρακολουθείς τη γάτα μέσα από το παράθυρο.
translations.nb: Du ser på katten gjennom vinduet.
translations.sv: Du tittar på katten genom fönstret.
translations.cs: Díváš se na kočku přes okno.
translations.da: Du kigger på katten gennem vinduet.

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 2nd person singular; subject of the verb.
Finite verb in present indicative, 2nd person singular; takes le chat as direct object.
Definite article, masculine singular; introduces chat.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of observes.
Preposition indicating path/means; introduces the noun phrase la fenêtre.
Definite article, feminine singular; introduces fenêtre.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition par; expresses the medium ('through the window').

sentences.target: Nous observons les étoiles ce soir.

translations.fr: Nous observons les étoiles ce soir.
translations.en: We are watching the stars tonight.
translations.de: Wir beobachten heute Abend die Sterne.
translations.ru: Мы наблюдаем за звёздами сегодня вечером.
translations.vi: Tối nay chúng tôi quan sát các vì sao.
translations.uk: Ми спостерігаємо за зірками сьогодні ввечері.
translations.hi: आज रात हम तारों को देख रहे हैं।
translations.sv: I kväll tittar vi på stjärnorna.
translations.da: I aften kigger vi på stjernerne.

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 1st person plural; subject of the verb.
Finite verb in present indicative, 1st person plural; takes les étoiles as direct object.
Definite article, plural; introduces étoiles.
Common noun, feminine plural; direct object of observons.
Demonstrative determiner; forms time expression ce soir ('this evening').
Common noun, masculine singular; temporal complement indicating when.

sentences.target: On aime observer les gens au parc.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ n‿ɛm ɔp.sɛʁ.ve le ʒɑ̃ o paʁk/

translations.fr: On aime observer les gens au parc.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ n‿ɛm ɔp.sɛʁ.ve le ʒɑ̃ o paʁk/
translations.en: We like to watch people at the park.
translations.es: Nos gusta observar a la gente en el parque.
translations.de: Wir beobachten gern Leute im Park.
translations.it: Ci piace osservare le persone al parco.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们喜欢在公园观察人们。
translations.yue: 我哋鍾意喺公園度睇人。
translations.ru: Нам нравится наблюдать за людьми в парке.
translations.pt: Gostamos de observar pessoas no parque.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi thích quan sát mọi người ở công viên.
translations.ar: نحن نحب مراقبة الناس في الحديقة.
translations.nl: Wij kijken graag naar mensen in het park.
translations.uk: Нам подобається спостерігати за людьми в парку.
translations.hu: Szeretjük figyelni az embereket a parkban.
translations.hi: हमें पार्क में लोगों को देखना पसंद है।
translations.el: Μας αρέσει να παρατηρούμε τους ανθρώπους στο πάρκο.
translations.nb: Vi liker å se på folk i parken.
translations.id: Kami suka mengamati orang-orang di taman.
translations.sv: Vi gillar att titta på folk i parken.
translations.ro: Ne place să observăm oamenii în parc.
translations.da: Vi kan godt lide at kigge på folk i parken.
translations.ja: 私たちは公園で人間観察をするのが好きです。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal/collective subject pronoun; subject of the verb.
Finite verb in present indicative, 3rd person singular; takes an infinitival complement.
Infinitive verb functioning as the complement of aime; denotes the action liked.
Definite article, plural; introduces gens.
Plural noun (invariable form); direct object of observer; denotes people.
Contraction of à + le; preposition introducing the location parc.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition au; indicates place.
